name: X-Golf Shorewood
about: X-Golf Shorewood is an indoor golf simulator venue that offers the world's most accurate golf simulation experience. The facility uses state-of-the-art technology, including camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide a realistic and immersive golfing environment. Each simulator bay can accommodate up to six people, making it suitable for both individual practice and group play. The venue also features a full-service sports bar with a food menu, providing a complete social and recreational experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism from state-of-the-art simulator technology
Flexible options for all skill levels, from casual play to professional training
Full-service sports bar with food and drinks, creating a complete social experience
Availability of PGA-certified coaching for skill development

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu including apps, pizza, wraps, and more
Full service bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art indoor golf simulator with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the simulator has its own tee built into the system and provides club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service bar and kitchen with its own menu; no BYOB is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes 1 hour for an individual player to play 18 holes. With more players, you may need to book additional hours depending on group size and skill level.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages and offers junior golf lessons.
